directives.rule: Treat project_root and bridge_root as different worlds; never swap Evidence vs Scratch paths.
Do not assume end users have ps-api/ps-web/ps-dev repos. Customer flows must target project_root + bridge tool only.
Never seed fake evidence to satisfy a grader; regenerate real evidence or update refs/contracts.
Do not add deployment/CI vendor coupling unless explicitly requested.
Primary litmus project is poc-calculator. Demo projects are optional fixtures and must be marked is_demo=true.
Work-producing runs must include context_capsule_ref, lock_set_ref, task_brief_ref, project_root_ref, and bridge_root_ref.
Save operations in governed UX must publish with version + audit metadata and preserve history.
On 3 failed attempts for same blocker: stop changes, run 5-Why, create incident evidence bundle, escalate.
Externally shared users must not infer .planestack content (no listing/search/counts/breadcrumb leakage).
Use design-system primitives; avoid ad-hoc page CSS and hardcoded chart colors.
Done requires deterministic fixtures, contract pass, e2e gate pass, evidence artifacts, mirrored sprint docs, and closeout evidence.
No unrelated file churn or broad refactors unless explicitly scoped. Contract changes must update OpenAPI, tests, and evidence expectations.
Before coding: identify sprint evidence paths, confirm roots, confirm repo scope, and confirm validation commands.

Work-producing runs require SPRINT_CODE and must write evidence under .planestack/governance/evidence/<sprint_code>/**. Ad-hoc diagnostics without SPRINT_CODE must use s99 and set reason=adhoc_no_sprint_code.
